title: Reincarnated Into My Third Life: Watch Me Defy the Fate
author: Unknown

veythor.name: Veythor
veythor.epithet: A twice-dead soul, calculating and cold
veythor.desc: Reincarnated for a third time with the memories of two prior lives. Coldly pragmatic and a master of manufactured sincerity, he treats emotion — his own and others' — as a lever to be pulled.

shimi.name: Shimi
shimi.epithet: A-ranked mage talent, nine years old
shimi.desc: Kind, direct, and quick to defend the people around her, even when she has every reason not to trust them.

raika.name: Raika
raika.epithet: Seven years old, magic not yet awakened
raika.desc: Guarded and quick to suspect strangers, with a quiet devotion to Shimi he hasn't fully admitted to himself.
